title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates:
Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates!
